title: INOD Stock Rockets After Massive Q1 2026 Earnings Beat
text: Innodata Inc. (NASDAQ: INOD) surged approximately 90% on May 8, 2026, following a robust quarterly earnings announcement. The stock climbed from a prior close of $45.64 to an intraday peak of $91.88, closing at $86.84. The company reported Q1 2026 revenue of $90.1 million, representing 54% year-over-year growth and exceeding analyst expectations of $76.5 million. Net income more than doubled while adjusted EBITDA reached approximately $25 million with a 28% margin. The company secured a major contract worth roughly $51 million in expected revenue from a large technology customer and raised full-year 2026 guidance to approximately 40%+ revenue growth. The momentum reflects investor enthusiasm for Innodata's artificial intelligence and data solutions business. The company announced the launch of an Evaluation and Observability Platform designed for agentic AI systems, signaling expansion into higher-margin product offerings beyond service-based revenue. Trading metrics showed strong intraday momentum, with the stock rallying from approximately $73 at market open to above $80 within minutes, subsequently grinding higher through the session. The intraday range spanned $72.80 to $91.88. From a valuation perspective, INOD trades with a P/E ratio above 50 and price-to-sales around 6. However, the company maintains a clean balance sheet with total debt-to-equity near 0.04 and generates positive free cash flow, which analysts cite as supporting the elevated multiple given the growth trajectory.
